title: Single vs Dual Sourcing: Supply Risk
alt: Comparison of single sourcing and dual sourcing models for pharmaceutical supply risk

left.heading: Single Sourcing
points: Single point of failure halts supply
Needs safety stock, escrow and tested BCP
Acceptable only when justified and documented

right.heading: Dual Sourcing
points: Resilience by design; loss of one source survivable
Comparability and stability burden between sources
Not set and forget; sustain the controls
